asset.title: Chat
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates the real-time chat feature within NodeRoom's collaborative workspace, showing typing, sending, and instant rendering.

featureClarity.evidence: The chat input and message log are clearly highlighted and shown in action.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the full sequence from clicking the input field to typing and sending the message.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface, though the multi-column layout is somewhat dense.

consistency.evidence: Integrates well with the spreadsheet and agent panels shown in the workspace.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows authentic UI interaction with realistic financial review context.

legibility.evidence: Text is legible, though the font size is relatively small at standard zoom.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates real-time collaboration useful for finance and team reviews.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the UI state changes without simulated effects.

observedEvidence: Interactive chat panel with message input
Real-time message rendering in the chat log
Multi-column workspace containing a spreadsheet and agent panel
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Send instant messages to coordinate tasks directly alongside your shared spreadsheets and agents.
